content:
# Organic Richness

**Summary**: The amount of organic matter present in a rock.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] measured TOC to assess the impact of preservation on organic content.

- [[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025]] evaluated the impact of organic richness on carbonate mudrock behavior during CO2 interaction.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] Indicates the potential for hydrocarbon generation.

- [[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025]] evaluated the impact of organic richness on carbonate mudrock behavior during CO2 interaction.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] Rock-Eval Pyrolysis analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Un-preserved samples showed significant drops in TOC values compared with average preserved samples. ([[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023, p. 17]])

- Higher organic richness influenced both isotopic and petrophysical responses to CO2. ([[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025, p. 5]])
